observations.summary: Dan's dreams represent a deliberate, upward striving towards the stars and original light, symbolizing aspiration and spiritual ascent, while the physical reality imposes a confining ceiling, symbolizing limitation and constraint.

left_evidence.quote: His dreams had always found their way there. Not the shapeless kind. Deliberate. He had dreamed of climbing endless stairs in the dark, his legs never tiring, the air growing thinner and cleaner with every step. Of jumping and not coming back down. Of spreading his arms and rising until the whole dark earth curved below him like a broken plate.

right_evidence.quote: Everyone who has ever woken from that kind of dream and found a ceiling above them instead of open sky will understand what he was after.
